name: product-playbook
description: A 15-phase product playbook for solo builders and small teams — taking an idea from 'I think there's something here' to a real shipped MVP. Includes durable principles, PRFAQ, GTM, design, MVP scope, multi-POV stress test, explicit go/no-go gate, access-pattern-first data model, buildable backlog, real UI build with mock data and a dev-server feedback loop, and an API build that swaps mock for real entity by entity. Optional push of artifacts into the team's toolchain (GitHub Issues, Jira, Linear, Confluence, Notion, Figma) via vendor MCPs. Bundled with a multi-POV antagonist skill for stress-testing each phase.
